title: M&T Bank Corporation to Participate in the BancAnalysts Association of Boston Conference
text: BUFFALO, N.Y. , Oct. 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- M&T Bank Corporation ("M&T") (NYSE:MTB) will participate in the BancAnalysts Association of Boston Conference being held in Boston, MA.

title: M&T Bank Corporation (MTB) Beats Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: M&T Bank Corporation (MTB) came out with quarterly earnings of $4.05 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $3.94 per share. This compares to earnings of $3.83 per share a year ago.

title: M&T Bank Corporation (NYSE:MTB) announces third quarter 2023 results
text: BUFFALO, N.Y. , Oct. 18, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- M&T Bank Corporation ("M&T" or "the Company") reports net income of $690 million or $3.98 of diluted earnings per common share.

title: M&T Bank Corporation Announces Series H Preferred Stock Quarterly Dividend
text: BUFFALO, N.Y. , Oct. 17, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- M&T Bank Corporation ("M&T") (NYSE:MTB) announced that it has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.3515625 per share on its Perpetual Fixed-to-Floating Rate Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock, Series H ("Series H Preferred Stock").

title: Navigating M&T Bank: A Hidden Gem Or A Lost Cause?
text: M&T Bank is a nuanced hold with a $155 price target, suggesting limited upside. Sturdy foundation: Conservative lending, robust capital, consistent dividend. Challenges: Increased nonperforming loans, low credit allowance, projected negative revenue growth.
